query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO unbillable_services (serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, reason, markedBy)
SELECT s.externalId, s.customerExternalId, 'Xero billing line item - not a supplier cost', 'system'
FROM services s
WHERE s.provider = 'SmileTel' AND s.dataSource = 'Xero Feb 2026 Invoice'
AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL;
